title: Problem with getting DATATYPE xsd:string back
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_graph (id Int32, title String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT DISTINCT id AS me, title AS var3, toString(var3) AS var4 FROM test_graph WHERE id = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT id AS me, title AS var3, toString(var3) AS var4 FROM test_graph WHERE var3 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: DATATYPE function fails for XML output
